note: No access token here on purpose — it is kept out of git. The token is a public (pk.*) client token, URL-restricted to subsidyclock.co.uk, set as the Vercel env var MAPBOX_TOKEN; scripts/inject-mapbox-token.js writes site/mapbox-token.js at deploy and site/map.js appends it to the static-image URL client-side. Because it is domain-locked, the basemap 403s off-domain (e.g. localhost) — it only renders on the live site. Served by Mapbox's Static Images API per their ToS (not self-hosted). Marker projection is Web Mercator from center/zoom/width/height, matching the static image exactly.
